title: Add ability to sort files by name
excerpt:

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml:
It appears that the only sort option is “last update”. This really diminishes the feature’s usefulness for us.

We run a real estate brokerage and track dozens of files with each transaction. We employ a specific naming convention to make it easy to locate and verify documents at a glance. Having no ability to sort in alpha order makes it difficult to the point that we are considering having a separate repository which would degrade the value of Monday all together for us. This seems like an obvious miss because every other app I have used that deals with files has the ability to sort.

I would really appreciate this feature or advice on a work around or third party app that can accomplish this.

Thanks!
